details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. The Zig INIObject.zig file is well-structured with proper create/parse/stringify functions using correct signatures and conventions (jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import("bun")). Parser handles sections, key=value pairs, semicolon/hash comments, inline comments, type coercion (booleans, nulls, numbers), quoted string preservation, and edge cases like CRLF and leading zeros. Stringify properly formats output with sections and handles arrays. Integration is complete: wired via lazy property callback in BunObject.zig, C++ exports and hash table entries added, TypeScript definitions comprehensive with examples. Parser is self-contained with no npm dependencies. Comprehensive test suite covers all functionality including round-trip parsing. Minor deduction only for extreme conservatism in code review evaluation.
